prompt: Replace the face of the woman in the first image with the face of the woman in the second image, and use the third image as the background.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Replace the face of the woman in image 1 with the face of the woman from image 2, while maintaining her original posture, headwear, and attire. Replace the dark background of image 1 with the interior room scene from image 3, integrating the woman from image 1 naturally into the foreground of this new environment.
